title: Complete checkout from the cart
description: A patient can proceed from cart to checkout and complete an order successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the Moroccan phone number field with a valid phone number
Fill in the OTP field with a valid 6-digit code
Open a product from the catalog
Add the product to the cart
Verify a successful order confirmation is visible

title: Add a product to the cart from product details
description: An authenticated patient can open a product and add it to the cart successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the Moroccan phone number field with a valid phone number
Fill in the OTP field with a valid 6-digit code
Open a product from the catalog
Add the product to the cart
Verify the cart contains the added product

title: Open and continue a patient conversation from admin chat

steps.description: Fill in the admin email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the admin password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Open the chat for a patient
Verify the admin chat thread is displayed

title: Complete patient phone sign-in and reach the patient experience
description: A patient can finish onboarding, sign in with a Moroccan phone number and OTP, and access authenticated patient screens afterward.

steps.description: Verify the app loading screen is displayed
Click the control to continue past the splash screen
Click the control to continue onboarding
Click the control to begin phone sign-in
Fill in the Moroccan phone number field with a valid phone number
Fill in the OTP field with a valid 6-digit code
Verify the patient experience is displayed

description: This test verifies that an admin can log in with valid credentials and access the dashboard workspace after verification.

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed

Fill in the OTP field with a valid 6-digit code
Fill in the message field with a unique text message
Verify the sent message appears in the conversation thread

description: This verifies a logged-in patient can open chat and initiate a call that reaches the call screen.

steps.description: Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field

Start a call from the chat screen

Fill in the OTP field with a valid OTP

Add the product to the cart
